name: Lamb with Blackberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 jalapeno pepper, seeded and diced (or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a pan.
2. Add chopped shallots and garlic. Cook until translucent.
3. Mix blackberry pulp, honey, whole clove, cardamom, and jalapeno pepper (or to taste).
4. Pour in the port wine and reduce mixture by half.
5. Grill or broil lamb chops for about 4 minutes on each side until medium-rare.
6. Serve with the sauce.
